name: Ω-ENERGY-T / Systèmes Énergétiques de Tristan
core_axiom: Energy is not created; it is captured, converted, stored, routed, synchronized, filtered, recovered partially, or dissipated with explicit losses and safety boundaries.
cvcd_invariants: thermal and electrical safety are explicit
baselines include ideal and non-ideal models
claims above 100 percent efficiency are rejected unless classified as measurement error or boundary mismatch
oak_risks: confusing resonance with net energy gain
m_minus: No energy-free or over-unity claim can be promoted; every gain claim must include boundary, units, losses and measurement uncertainty.
notes: Priority MVP is a safe low-voltage simulated microgrid before any physical energy hardware work.
